findings.message:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager._selectAndPayWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#257-303):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: pool.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#293)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- pool.status = finished (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#300)
	FinancialPoolManager.pools (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#43) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FinancialPoolManager._generateRandom(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#311-323)
	- FinancialPoolManager._selectAndPayWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#257-303)
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#101-119)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#66-95)
	- FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#125-138)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#339-371)
	- FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#173-202)
	- FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#144-167)
	- FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#208-251)
findings.name: reentrancy-eth

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#208-251) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- participantInfo.payments == duePayments && ! participantInfo.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#241)
findings.name: incorrect-equality

findings.message: FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256).index (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#183) is a local variable never initialized
findings.name: uninitialized-local

findings.message:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager._selectAndPayWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#257-303):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: pool.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#293)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- PoolFinished(poolId) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#301)
	- WinnerSelected(poolId,winner,pool.goodValue) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#296)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#173-202) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Can only leave pools accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#177-180)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#101-119) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(msg.sender == pool.owner,Only pool owner can activate) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#105)
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Pool is not accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#106-109)
	- require(bool,string)(pool.totalParticipants >= pool.minParticipants,Minimum participants requirement not met) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#110-113)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#144-167) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Pool is not accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#148-151)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#208-251) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(active)),Pool is not active) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#212-215)
	- require(bool,string)(msg.value == pool.installmentValue,Incorrect installment value) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#226)
	- require(bool,string)(participantInfo.payments < duePayments,No payment due yet) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#232)
	- participantInfo.payments == duePayments && ! participantInfo.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#241)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#125-138) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(msg.sender == pool.owner,Only pool owner can delete) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#129)
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Can only delete pools accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#130-133)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version
